title: <div><tt>├── MEMORY_VERIFIED_MB/         # Refined, consolidated blocks for syst
content:
├── MEMORY_VERIFIED_MB/ # Refined, consolidated blocks for system logic
├── THREAD_REVIVALS/ # Snapshots from previous GPT threads
├── TO_PROCESS/ # Notes awaiting sorting

New: Active Design Modules

├── SYS_MAP_OS_4BLOOM/ # Master architecture map (artist IDs, logic layers)
├── SYS_EXPAND_PHASE_2.5/ # Current phase — logic split, business system cascade
├── SYS_INPUT_PEERS/ # All feedback/questions from peers or real-world users
├── SYS_EDU_PEDS/ # Pedagogy, syllabi, modular curriculum
├── SYS_PRODUCT_EXPORTS/ # Manifestos, Readmes, Pitch Decks, Zines, PDFs

Each folder should include:
- `.txt` or `.md` files titled by module/topic
- A `00_INDEX.md` file listing all contents + suggested review order
